mnemonics.title: RCT Components
mnemonics.content: Randomized Controlled Trials: PICOT - Population, Intervention, Comparison, Outcome, Time

acronyms.usage: Comparing group means in experimental data

visualTips.visualization: Matrix showing all variable combinations (2x2 grid for two binary variables)

analogies.analogy: Like a recipe control group = original recipe, experimental group = modified recipe
